title: DualBar
description: Show the locator bar icons over the experience bar.
body:
I was annoyed that the locator bar vanished when you get experience, so I made them show up at the same time!

* Locator bar doesn't hide experience.
* Locator dots show up over the experience bar.
* Locator dots show up over the jump bar when mounting a horse.

I made this for myself but I hope other people can enjoy it too!

Feel free to fork, modify, hack, and/or remix.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_P_ft1ZbJrs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

Alternatives: 

* [Locator Border](https://modrinth.com/mod/locator-border): Moves the locator bar to the border of the screen
